subject: Bump the maven group across 1 directory with 5 updates
commit_message:
Bump the maven group across 1 directory with 5 updates

Bumps the maven group with 4 updates in the /aai-parent directory: [ch.qos.logback:logback-core](https://github.com/qos-ch/logback), [junit:junit](https://github.com/junit-team/junit4), [com.jayway.jsonpath:json-path](https://github.com/jayway/JsonPath) and commons-net:commons-net.

Updates `ch.qos.logback:logback-core` from 1.4.10 to 1.5.13
- [Release notes](https://github.com/qos-ch/logback/releases)
- [Commits](https://github.com/qos-ch/logback/compare/v_1.4.10...v_1.5.13)

Updates `ch.qos.logback:logback-classic` from 1.4.10 to 1.5.13
- [Release notes](https://github.com/qos-ch/logback/releases)
- [Commits](https://github.com/qos-ch/logback/compare/v_1.4.10...v_1.5.13)

Updates `junit:junit` from 4.12 to 4.13.1
- [Release notes](https://github.com/junit-team/junit4/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/junit-team/junit4/blob/main/doc/ReleaseNotes4.12.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/junit-team/junit4/compare/r4.12...r4.13.1)

Updates `com.jayway.jsonpath:json-path` from 2.2.0 to 2.9.0
- [Release notes](https://github.com/jayway/JsonPath/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/json-path/JsonPath/blob/master/changelog.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/jayway/JsonPath/compare/2.2.0...json-path-2.9.0)

Updates `commons-net:commons-net` from 3.8.0 to 3.9.0

updated-dependencies:
- dependency-name: ch.qos.logback:logback-core
  dependency-type: direct:production
  dependency-group: maven
- dependency-name: ch.qos.logback:logback-classic
  dependency-type: direct:production
  dependency-group: maven
- dependency-name: junit:junit
  dependency-type: direct:development
  dependency-group: maven
- dependency-name: com.jayway.jsonpath:json-path
  dependency-type: direct:production
  dependency-group: maven
- dependency-name: commons-net:commons-net
  dependency-type: direct:production
  dependency-group: maven

Issue-ID: CIMAN-33

Change-Id: I63329da796bc232b535dbe68ffe5bfd5f131b98a
Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>

Abandoning: this maven group bump is an older variant of change 140549 (logback from-version 1.4.10 does not match master's current 1.4.14). 140549 carries the correct base versions for the same set of upgrades.

Context: Cleanup to resync Gerrit and GitHub state after a historical change-correlation bug in lfreleng-actions/github2gerrit-action.
